title: A Bread Factory, Part One
original_title: A Bread Factory, Part One: For the Sake of Gold
overview: After 40 years of running their community arts space The Bread Factory, Dorothea and Greta are suddenly fighting for survival when a pair of celebrity performance artists from China come to Checkford and build an enormous complex down the street, catapulting big changes in their small town.
